overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along elevated highways toward the Night City metropolis during golden hour. The player navigates through sparse traffic, under complex overpass interchanges, and past desert badlands into an urban construction zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with metal guardrails approaching metropolis

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway with a small bobblehead figure visible on the dashboard

entered.detail: metal safety barriers running parallel to the road on both sides
futuristic metropolis with tall glass towers visible in the distance
highway sign structure spanning across the road
tall electrical transmission towers along the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated highway during golden hour, with metal guardrails lining both sides of the asphalt road. The futuristic Night City skyline is visible in the far distance, bathed in warm sunlight. The vehicle cruises steadily with sparse traffic ahead, passing under overhead sign gantries and alongside electrical infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with desert landscape and commercial billboards

events.description: catches up to and overtakes a black pickup truck on the highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating to overtake slower traffic while navigating between lanes

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving ahead in the same lane before being overtaken

entered.detail: large commercial advertising billboard alongside the highway
arid badlands with sparse cacti and dry vegetation
elevated road structure crossing over the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through arid desert terrain with large commercial billboards appearing on the right. The vehicle catches up to and overtakes a black pickup truck around the 18-second mark. The city skyline grows larger and more detailed as the distance closes, transitioning from a distant silhouette to distinct buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses

events.description: enters complex highway interchange with multiple levels of overpasses and ramps

agents.ego_description: navigating through curved ramps and underpasses of the highway interchange

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure casting shadows across the road
curved highway ramp connecting to upper levels
tall highway lighting poles along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a complex multi-level highway interchange with massive concrete overpasses creating partial cover overhead. The lighting becomes mixed as the vehicle passes through shadows cast by the infrastructure. Desert terrain and billboards exit the frame as the road curves through the concrete maze of ramps and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban construction zone with industrial buildings and cranes

events.description: enters urban canyon with construction sites and industrial architecture

agents.ego_description: driving through the industrial approach to the city center with construction visible

entered.detail: large yellow construction crane towering over building site
low-rise industrial warehouse with corrugated metal exterior
tall buildings creating narrow corridor effect along the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters an urban canyon with construction cranes and industrial buildings lining the road. The sky becomes mostly blocked by surrounding infrastructure and elevated highways. The vehicle drives past construction sites and industrial pipes, with the city center now looming close ahead, transitioning from highway driving to urban street navigation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along an elevated highway that transforms from an open desert vista into a dense urban industrial canyon. It begins on a wide asphalt road lined with metal guardrails, cruising toward the distant, sun-drenched silhouette of the Night City skyline under a warm golden hour glow. As the vehicle overtakes a black pickup truck, the surrounding arid terrain gives way to large commercial billboards while the city buildings grow larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts into a complex multi-level interchange, where the open sky is intermittently blocked by the heavy shadows of massive concrete overpasses and curving ramps. Finally, the road enters a claustrophobic urban corridor filled with construction cranes, industrial pipes, and towering infrastructure as the vehicle transitions from the highway into the heart of the city.
